title: Incident Report Example
subtitle: Document incident impact, timeline, causes, and follow-ups.

sections.heading: Incident Report in use
sections.body: This incident report shows how to document a UI quality miss: impact, timeline, root cause, and corrective action.

cards.title: Impact
cards.body: Users could click into examples that looked empty or unrelated to the promised template category.

cards.title: Root cause
cards.body: The generator optimized for static validation coverage, not demonstration quality.

cards.title: Resolution
cards.body: Replace shared placeholder sections with template-specific sample payloads.

rows: Add guard tests and browser verification

steps.title: Guard against placeholder copy
steps.body: Assert generated examples do not contain the old smoke-test phrases.

steps.title: Check representative demos
steps.body: Open SVG, diagram, design-system, math interactive, and editor pages in light mode.
